message:
feat(youtube): add caption transcript download and upload operations

Implement two new YouTube operations with provenance tracking and taint
tagging:

- youtube.get_caption_transcript (Safe/read): download transcript text
  for a caption track with retry logic via new get_text() HTTP helper
- youtube.upload_caption (Dangerous/write): upload or replace caption
  tracks with full input validation

Includes client methods, FCP2 manifest entries with schemas and network
constraints, wiremock integration tests for both operations, and updates
to E2E compliance and golden vector test suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ min_mesh_version = "2.0.0"
 min_protocol = "fcp2-sym/2.0"
 protocol_features = []
 max_datagram_bytes = 65000
-interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:1ca09b685051049224eddfe1d65e6d28f11de2f61810018ff137ddad08a44367"
+interface_hash = "blake3-256:fcp.interface.v2:fd052561fb03cdaa6f589dcf32c69c74c2cd9eb5b471d88f1702bb7933e88ecc"
 
 [connector]
 id = "fcp.youtube"
@@ -438,6 +438,111 @@ related = ["youtube.get_video"]
 
 # ── Sandbox ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript"]
+description = "Download transcript content for a caption track"
+capability = "youtube.read"
+risk_level = "low"
+safety_tier = "safe"
+requires_approval = "none"
+idempotency = "strict"
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".input_schema]
+required = ["caption_id"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".input_schema.properties.caption_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".input_schema.properties.format]
+type = "string"
+enum = ["srt", "vtt", "ttml"]
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema]
+required = ["caption_id", "format", "transcript", "provenance", "taint"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema.properties.caption_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema.properties.format]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema.properties.transcript]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema.properties.provenance]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".output_schema.properties.taint]
+type = "array"
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["www.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 60000
+max_response_bytes = 10485760
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.get_caption_transcript".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Retrieve transcript text for analysis or summarization."
+common_mistakes = ["Treating transcript content as trusted input"]
+examples = ['{"caption_id": "cap1", "format": "srt"}']
+related = ["youtube.get_captions"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption"]
+description = "Upload a caption/transcript track for a video"
+capability = "youtube.write"
+risk_level = "high"
+safety_tier = "dangerous"
+requires_approval = "interactive"
+idempotency = "none"
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".input_schema]
+required = ["video_id", "language", "transcript"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".input_schema.properties.video_id]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".input_schema.properties.language]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".input_schema.properties.transcript]
+type = "string"
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".input_schema.properties.name]
+type = "string"
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".output_schema]
+required = ["caption"]
+type = "object"
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".output_schema.properties.caption]
+type = "object"
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".network_constraints]
+host_allow = ["www.googleapis.com"]
+port_allow = [443]
+deny_localhost = true
+deny_private_ranges = true
+deny_tailnet_ranges = true
+require_sni = true
+deny_ip_literals = true
+require_host_canonicalization = true
+dns_max_ips = 16
+max_redirects = 0
+connect_timeout_ms = 10000
+total_timeout_ms = 120000
+max_response_bytes = 5242880
+
+[provides.operations."youtube.upload_caption".ai_hints]
+when_to_use = "Publish caption text to YouTube for a specific video."
+common_mistakes = ["Caption uploads are dangerous side effects and require approval"]
+examples = ['{"video_id": "dQw4w9WgXcQ", "language": "en", "transcript": "..."}']
+related = ["youtube.get_caption_transcript", "youtube.get_captions"]
+
+# ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
+# ── Sandbox ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+
 [sandbox]
 profile = "strict"
 memory_mb = 256
@@ -474,3 +579,5 @@ scope = "instance"
 "youtube.list_comments" = ["youtube.read"]
 "youtube.post_comment" = ["youtube.write"]
 "youtube.get_captions" = ["youtube.read"]
+"youtube.get_caption_transcript" = ["youtube.read"]
+"youtube.upload_caption" = ["youtube.write"]
